trails.title: Where Tennessee Began
trails.description: The Southwest Territory was born at Rocky Mount. Follow the documents that trace this founding moment.

documents.title: Southwest Territory Act
documents.excerpt: Congress establishes the Territory South of the River Ohio...

trails.title: Governor Blount's Dispatches
trails.description: The official correspondence of Governor William Blount from his office at Rocky Mount.

documents.title: Blount's Commission
documents.excerpt: Thomas Jefferson commissions William Blount as Governor...

trails.title: The Treaty Trail
trails.description: From the Treaty of Holston to the additional articles, the path of Cherokee-U.S. relations.

documents.title: Treaty of Holston
documents.excerpt: Perpetual peace and friendship between the United States and the Cherokee Nation...
